hero.label: Made for Samsara
hero.headline: I want to help physical operations teams win with Samsara.
hero.subheadline: Samsara stands out to me because it serves the real-world industries that keep everything moving, from fleets to field operations. The SDR role is exciting because I would be starting conversations around products that clearly improve safety, visibility, and efficiency through connected operations data.

whyCompany.title: Samsara solves real problems for physical operations
whyCompany.body: I am drawn to Samsara because the platform helps companies manage fleets, safety, and operations with real-time visibility. The combination of IoT sensors, GPS tracking, and AI-driven insights makes the value proposition concrete and easy to believe in.

whyCompany.title: Strong growth and hiring momentum make this a great time
whyCompany.body: Samsara is at an exciting stage as a public company with broad product adoption and a large number of open roles across go-to-market teams. That signals momentum, investment in growth, and a chance for an SDR to learn fast in a company that is still scaling.

whyCompany.title: My outbound experience fits this SDR opportunity
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai, I worked as a BDR using cold outreach, HubSpot, and LinkedIn sequences and helped bring in 15 to 20 paying clients. At NextAfter, I deepened my digital marketing understanding in a B2B consulting environment, which strengthened how I think about messaging, buyer pain points, and campaign strategy.

quote: I want this role because Samsara sells something that matters in the real world, not just on a dashboard. I am excited by the idea of opening doors for a platform that helps customers operate safer and smarter every day.
